chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP No.D-3313 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). 1. For orde3r on Misc. No.9009/2022 (U/A). 2. For hearing of Misc. No.6384/2022 3. For hearing of Misc. No.14009/2021 (Stay) 4. For hearing of main case 01.04.2022 M/s.Imran Iqbal, & Anil Zia, Advocates for the Petitioner. Mr. Aamir Raza, Advocate for the Respondent a/w Mr. Tariq Aziz, Principal Appraiser Port Qasim, Karachi. Mr. Kafeel Ahmed Abbasi, D.A.G. -.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency application is granted. 2to4. Learned counsel does not press this petition as the purpose of filing this petition has been served. He therefore, requests that security deposited with the Nazir of this may be returned alongwith profit accrued thereon. We see no impediment in allowing this application. This application is allowed in presence of the counsel appearing for the Customs Department, who waives notice. Nazir is directed to return the security amount alongwith profits accrued thereon, if any, to the petitioner after due verification and identification. Instant petition stands disposed of as not pressed alongwith pending applications. JUDGE JUDGE SM
